Recent updates from New York City include a blizzard causing significant disruptions, including school closures and emergency responses, alongside a controversial fire incident linked to a spider extermination attempt, and ongoing discussions about public safety and housing issues amid rising costs and protests.

### Risks & Alerts

- N.Y. weather: Black ice hazard grips Staten Island as multiple winter weather events loom. [↗](https://news.google.?oc=5)
